task: Demo log-triage classifier — the canonical close-the-loop demo. Takes a single log/error/exception line and returns one of 6 categories (db / network / auth / deploy / app-bug / infra) plus the keyword signals that matched. Deterministic regex matrix in examples/demo-log-triage/recipe.js. Seeds (40 rows) cover every category and the unknown fallback. Comparator: json_subset on { category, signals }. K-score gate: 0.85. This recipe is the target of `kolm demo seed-log-triage` (seeds ~150 events to the lake so optimize/dataset/bakeoff/build/run/what all have something real to chew on).

training_stats.approach: deterministic keyword-matrix classifier. 6 categories + unknown fallback. ~40 regex rules total. Categories ordered by precedence (db before network because timeout overlaps; auth before app-bug because forbidden vs ReferenceError overlap; deploy before infra because oom-on-pod vs oom overlap). Same input -> same output. Comparator json_subset on { category, signals }.
